meta.note: subscription auth; codex reports tokens, not USD

A.reason: It identifies someone who does something and subsequently does that same thing again.

B.missing: It wrongly requires the same act to occur many later times; one recurrence is sufficient.
B.reason: The repetition differentia is present, but the many-times condition improperly narrows the sense.

C.reason: It economically represents someone doing something and doing the same thing again afterward.

D.reason: It establishes the same action both before and at a later time, though an extra untimed action is redundant.

E.reason: It sharply captures a person doing something and then doing that same thing again.
